stable.change_log:
BravePipe Release 0.28.4-2.7.0

- sync with v0.28.4
- Added automatic logcat dump integration into error reporting (captures logcat
  entries before crash timestamp, enabled via Brave Settings) experimental
- Integrated Logcat Viewer (activity and floating window) for in-app
  log inspection
- Introduced floating WebView service to handle Cloudflare challenges
  (enable and configure visibility via Brave Settings)
- Added subscription import/export options in Backup & Restore settings
- make ListHelper bitrate aware to fix rumble quality selection issue
BravePipeExtractor:
- Rumble: Add shorts to Kiosk
